findings_history.notes: 116 new tests. eslint-disable annotated. StickyNotesLayer memo. useCallback extractions.
143 tests (GraphBreadcrumbs, MapViewEmptyStates, ChangeHistoryPanel). Fixed ChangeHistoryPanel memo syntax.

102 new contract tests: MoreActionsDropdown (33 — conditional renders, a11y keyboard nav, outside click), GraphShortcutsDialog (30 — desktop/mobile panels, focus trap, dual Escape), GraphMultiSelectBar (39 — toolbar role, delete/connect/group gating, i18n). Quality/security/perf all clean. 2066 total tests.
